reviews.comment:
Lo único entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia... Si pasas, pará xq no hay más nada

(Translated by Google)
The only thing between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia... If you pass by, stop because there's nothing else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6bHBTX0FREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención predisposición de los playeros en ayudarte en lo que haga falta, lo mismo en la confitería la limpieza, el orden y la atención. Lindo lugar para hacer una parada en medio de la ruta 3 para estirar las piernas y descansar antes de seguir camino, tanto para el sur como para el norte.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The beach attendants are willing to help you with anything you need. The same goes for the cafeteria, with its cleanliness, order, and service. A nice place to stop off on Route 3 to stretch your legs and rest before continuing on, either south or north.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6LThyT1lREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, tanto de los playeros como los chicos del servicompras

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both from the beach attendants and the convenience store staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6cU9XZUxBEAE

reviews.comment:
La única estación de servicio funcionando entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia. Es un oasis para los que transitan por la ruta 3. El autoservicio tiene todo lo que hace falta y de puede comer ahí. Los baños están limpios y la atención es muy correcta.

(Translated by Google)
The only operating gas station between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia. It's an oasis for those traveling on Route 3. The self-service station has everything you need, and you can eat there. The restrooms are clean, and the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUeTU2RG5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace 10 días cargue gasoil ahí y quede tirado entrando a Trelew. Inyectores trabados , combustible contaminado fue el diagnóstico. Ojo gente!!!

(Translated by Google)
Ten days ago, I filled up with diesel there and got stuck on the way into Trelew. The diagnosis was seized injectors and contaminated fuel. Watch out, people!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUaXV2TnNnRRAB
